title: ligularia zhengyiana
intro: Ligularia zhengyiana, also known as Chinese goldenseal, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to China, and is used in traditional medicine. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of alkaloids, which exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory infections, fever, and skin problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off pathogens. In traditional herbal preparations, Ligularia zhengyiana is often used in combination with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
